feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is the vendor grouping key obsoleted in S4 Hana?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I can find the grouping key in customer company view only via tcode BP, but I can't find the grouping key in company view of FI vendor role. Is it obsoleted in S/4 Hana? Even I make it optional for the Single pmnt, grp key, PM supl. Only single payment can be find in this automatic payment transaction screen.

entry.title: Erro no VL09 ao usar BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CONFIRM_DEC
entry.content:
Olá pessoal bom dia, como vai todos vocês ? espero que estejam todos bem !!

Ao realizar um estorno do movimento de mercadorias na VL09 utilizando a BAPI para criação da Delivery, estamos encontrando este erro.

Alguém já enfrentou essa situação? E qual foi a solução adotada para contornar o problema?

entry.title: Vendor Grouping key not work
entry.content:
Hi All,

I try to using vendor grouping key to combine different vendor invoice(different vendor code) into a single payment document. But it is not work as expected. I try to use company code, fiscal year and payment method as the grouping key. And I checked from the payment proposal, seems it is correct. But two payment documents have been created in the payment list. What I want is only one single payment document. Since I need to pay to multiple bank account, so I won't use alternative payee method.

entry.title: Data Replication Framework license
entry.content:
Hi team.

I need to replicate business partners, and for this I need to know this:
Does the "Data Replication Framework" tool require a license to use in S/4HANA 2021 systems?

Regards!

entry.title: Billing on Future Date
entry.content:
Dear All,

Recently I got a requirement to post my invoices from multiple confirmation of my service orders into different periods. So I set the Billing dates in Future dates. But the Program/Manage Billing Due list is always picking the current date.

Does anyone know if I am missing anything on customization?

 

Regards

Sambit

entry.title: Random product selection in SAP EWM Cycle Counting?
entry.content: If we are using EWM Cycle Counting and let's say our interval is 180 days for indicator "A". After the 180 days is up and cycle counting starts over, does the system pick the same products in exact same order for new count? Or is there a way to force system to pick products assigned to "A" randomly, which is what the business desires.

entry.title: How to add Grant role and privilege to the user, error 258 insufficient privilege
entry.content:
Unable to create views in FARCHIVE1 due to the error message 

[SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB32 DLL][HDBODBC32] General error;258 insufficient privilege: Detailed info for this error can be found with guid '3A75978E5E879244828150ABCA9C08AD'

 




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Pricing Determination in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise System
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working with SAP S/4HANA On-Premise system and have a question regarding pricing determination.

Pricing Determination: I understand that there is an existing pricing determination routine in SAP S/4HANA. However, I am curious to know if this is the only way to implement pricing in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise system. Is it possible to use other methods for pricing determination? Can this be used as an alternative to the old pricing determination routine? As we are planning to do in Clean core way.

As per traditional way we can implement the Calculation routine using VOFM Tcode and configure the same in Pricing procedure.

Best Regards,
Padmakar Kudtarkar

entry.title: headers are not assigned to any storage location.
entry.content: Hi experts, headers are not assigned to any storage location. Please assist.

entry.title: Account group to BP Grouping Mapping during Synchronization
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are doing CVI pre conversion activities on ECC system. we are having intercompany customers & vendors which. Client want so assign them to a single BP as they are having common legal address.

Question is we have mapped customer & vendor account groups to individual BP grouping 1:1 relationship.

considering above intercompany requirement, Is it mandatory to assign those customer & vendor account group to a common BP grouping? during synchronization does system assign those customer & vendor to a common BP if we keep 1:1 account group to BP grpng mapping? 

we are planning configuration of mapping account groups to common BP during post conversion, Is this approach is feasible?

Thank you

entry.title: I am unable to create E-way bill for Subcontracting Challan
entry.content:
Hi SAP Family,

I am unable to create E-Way Bill in E-Document Cockpit based on Delivery challan.

We are creating Delivery challan using Outbound Delivery number for Subcontracting process.

Please guide me or suggest me any documents (SAP documents) related to this.

entry.title: Is it a best practice to integrate BW/4HANA directly with Anaplan ?
entry.content:
Is it best practice to integrate BW/4HANA directly with Anaplan? 

We are planning to implement S/4HANA on premise and Anaplan too for Financial Planning. Does anyone have experience on what is the best practice for integrating these 2 tools?

entry.title: How to find AND debug the technical object called in the backend for an API call in S/4 HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I am working on S/4 HANA Cloud: Public edition version 2402 and I would like to know how to find the technical name of the objet (BAPI? FM?) called in the backend system, when running a released API as we can find in SAP Business Accelerator hub.

For instance, to create a Sales Order, 3 APIs are available in the hub for public cloud: 

1/ We are not sure yet which one we should pick for our requirement. Any help on this?

2/ More important, I really want to be able to debug in Eclipse ABAP Development Tools, any Tryout call we do when testing one of these APIs. How can I do that? I have already access to ADT and to the backend system, was able to debug backend for some other requirements (not API calls), but would like to be able to debug API calls. 

I tried a put a breakpoint in ADT for the technical API communication user used when calling the API from Postman or from the API Hub website (tryout feature), but still, the breakpoint is not triggered. What am I missing?

3/ I would like to know exactly the technical object (BAPI name if any?) behind each API? I assume one of these "Create Sales Order (A2A) or (A2X)" APIs to create a Sales Order, calls in the backend BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2, right? 

By the way, the API calls have status 200, but still, not able to debug any of the API calls, nor able to find the technical objects called in the backend system, from the API call done in the cloud.

Thank you

entry.title: Use SAP Datasphere for S/4HANA Data Migration Staging Tables (2Q2)
entry.content:
Hello all

as per the usual method of using the HANA Cloud DB as Staging Tables in the S/4 - is it possible to use the HANA Space from the Datasphere in the same manner?

I have tried adding the Space Admin User as per the SAP_COM_0678 Communication Arrangement, but in the S/4 I only get connection errors. Whitelisting the IP might be the issue?

Best regards

Tarran

entry.title: Retire the SE16 in Production server
entry.content:
There is issue with Tx. SE16. Our management want to disable the use of Tx SE16 in Production environment.

We already restricted through authorization but remove the possibilities for accidental assignment . Please share the possibilities how should we proceed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need clarity on SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Malaysia Solution
entry.content:
Hi,

We need clarity on the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Malaysia(mandatory electronic invoicing) Solution.

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Do you know if there are a filter in the Roadmap for S4Hana Private by country.?
entry.content:
Dear Team,
Do you know if there are a filter to see the new functionalities within the Roadmap for S4Hana Private? I wrote the country within the search box to see the country. But I was wondering if there is another way to find the country.


Any comment I really appreciate.,

entry.title: Can we connect Service Cloud V1 and V2 to the same S4 HANA tenant. ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts. 

We want to explore Service Cloud V2 and the user story appears that it is possible to connect V1 and V2 running on the same S4 HANA tenant?

entry.title: SAP SD - Organizational Structure
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Requirement is a ad service company who has different product types calles weedmaps, canveya and ads and each product types will have different other services associated with it and also it has different pricing procedures. But customer wants to have a single invoice to be billed out for all these different products types with different pricing. How can we approach this by sales org, distribution channel and division? Or should I use any other field other than the org elements. I need to take a decision on how many sales org, distr chnl and division this customer can have. 
Please give me some advise.

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution)

entry.title: Issue with Depreciation Area Values in Assets
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We have encountered an issue with the modification of depreciation area values in our assets module, and we are seeking guidance/ideas/support on how to address it.

More specifically, whenever we modify values in depreciation area 01, it automatically impacts depreciation area 02. Similarly modifications in depreciation area 20 affect area 21 and so forth. However, for our IFRS reporting purposes, we require depreciation area 02 to maintain its own distinct values separate from those of area 01.

This issue has become particularly problematic following a recent merger, during which asset values were transferred in local currency and converted. Unfortunately, we neglected to transfer these values into euros, resulting in discrepancies between the original company's euro values and the exchange rates used during the conversion process.

We are seeking assistance in resolving this issue to ensure accurate reporting in accordance with IFRS standards. Could you please advise if there is a transaction type or alternative approach that would allow us to modify depreciation area values independently without impacting other areas?

Your prompt attention to this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.
